title: GitLab Merge Request
description: A GitLab merge request proposing changes from a source branch to be merged into a target branch within a project.

id.description: The globally unique identifier of the merge request.

iid.description: The internal project-scoped ID of the merge request.

project_id.description: The ID of the project the merge request belongs to.

title.description: The title of the merge request.

description.description: The description of the merge request, supporting Markdown syntax.

state.description: The current state of the merge request.

draft.description: Whether the merge request is in draft state and not ready for review.

source_branch.description: The name of the source branch containing the changes.

target_branch.description: The name of the target branch to merge changes into.

source_project_id.description: The ID of the project containing the source branch.

target_project_id.description: The ID of the project containing the target branch.

assignees.description: Users assigned to review and merge this merge request.

reviewers.description: Users requested to review this merge request.

merge_user.description: The user who merged the merge request.

labels.description: Labels applied to the merge request.

milestone.description: The milestone the merge request is associated with.

detailed_merge_status.description: The detailed merge readiness status of the merge request.

sha.description: The HEAD commit SHA of the source branch.

merge_commit_sha.description: The SHA of the merge commit, set after merging.

squash_commit_sha.description: The SHA of the squash commit, set after squash merging.

squash.description: Whether the merge request is configured to squash commits on merge.

web_url.description: The URL to view the merge request in a browser.

upvotes.description: The number of upvotes the merge request has received.

downvotes.description: The number of downvotes the merge request has received.

user_notes_count.description: The number of user-authored comments on the merge request.

changes_count.description: The number of files changed. May be a string for large diffs.

created_at.description: The date and time the merge request was created.

updated_at.description: The date and time the merge request was last updated.

merged_at.description: The date and time the merge request was merged.

prepared_at.description: The date and time the merge request was prepared for merging.

closed_at.description: The date and time the merge request was closed without merging.

UserSummary.description: A simplified representation of a GitLab user.

id.description: The unique identifier of the user.

name.description: The display name of the user.

state.description: The current state of the user account.

avatar_url.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

web_url.description: URL to the user's GitLab profile page.

Milestone.description: A milestone that groups issues and merge requests by a target date.

id.description: The unique identifier of the milestone.

iid.description: The project-scoped ID of the milestone.

project_id.description: The ID of the project the milestone belongs to.

state.description: The current state of the milestone.

due_date.description: The due date of the milestone in YYYY-MM-DD format.

web_url.description: URL to view the milestone in a browser.

References.description: Reference strings for the merge request.

relative.description: Relative reference format including project path.

full.description: Full reference format including namespace and project path.
